label: Synth / Station (clean hi-tech)

corridor.yaw_note: space_station wall-corner native facing is 90 deg off the space corridor-corner the CORNER_YAW table targets; +pi/2 corrects it.

scale_note: space_station is 1-unit → scale 4. Wall (1x1x0.3) has real thickness + full height (good). Floor is NOT provided: space_station floor is 0.3-thick (would step at zone boundaries), so floors fall back to the flush space template-floor; the sleek station WALLS carry the theme.
notes: NEEDS EDITOR TUNING: wall/corner yaw_offset, scale-4 check. Has wall-corner-round (alt corner), wall-window, door-single/double, plus stairs-* variants (the lower-stair quirk — future advanced stair logic). Furniture/computers/displays available as props later.
